pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point for chalet booking, store shopping, and managing existing bookings.
primary_functions: Provide quick search widget for chalets (dates, guests, basic filters) and link to full chalet search results.
Highlight primary store sections (Grocery & Essentials, Winter Gear, Fireplace & Comfort, Gift Cards) with links to relevant store categories.
Surface shortcuts to manage an existing booking and to view saved favorite chalets.
Show promotional content such as featured chalets, seasonal offers, and curated store bundles.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry via 'Home' header link
Users can land directly on the homepage URL

pages.name: Chalet Search & Results
pages.description: Search and filter chalets by dates, price, amenities, capacity, and location, and view a sortable list of available options.
primary_functions: Allow users to set or change check-in / check-out dates and guest configuration (adults, children) before running availability search.
Provide filters for maximum nightly price, total stay price, amenities (hot tub, sauna, pet-friendly), number of bedrooms, and distance from ski lifts (e.g., within 5 km).
Offer sorting options such as 'Price: Low to High' and 'Rating: High to Low' to reorder the results list.
Display each chalet with key details (name, price per night, total price for selected dates, rating, number of reviews, distance to lifts, bedroom count, amenity badges).
Link each chalet result to its detail page for deeper information and booking actions.

incoming_params.description: ISO check-in date (e.g. '2026-03-06') used to pre-populate the search form and execute an initial search.
ISO check-out date for the search context.
Number of adult guests for availability search.
Number of child guests for availability search.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a chalet card in the results list

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Find a chalet' header link
Users can load a specific search state using query parameters

pages.name: Chalet Detail
pages.description: Detailed information page for a specific chalet, including amenities, pricing, reviews, and booking actions.
primary_functions: Show comprehensive chalet details such as photos, description, amenities list (including hot tub, sauna, pet-friendly), bedroom count, capacity, and distance to ski lifts.
Display pricing for the selected dates (nightly and total stay price) and allow adjusting dates and guest counts in place.
Present overall star rating and number of reviews to support comparisons between similar chalets.
Provide a prominent 'Book now' button that passes the selected chalet, dates, and guest details to the booking form page.
Enable users to add or remove the chalet from their favorites via a heart icon, persisting the favorite status for later viewing.

incoming_params.description: Chalet ID whose details should be displayed.
Optional ISO check-in date to calculate stay pricing context.
Optional ISO check-out date to calculate stay pricing context.
Optional number of adults to carry over from search.
Optional number of children to carry over from search.

access_methods.description: Accessed by linking to chalet_detail.html?id={chaletId}[&checkIn=&checkOut=&adults=&children=]
Linked from search results, featured chalet cards, and favorites list

pages.name: Chalet Booking Form
pages.description: Booking details form to capture guest information and confirm stay details for a selected chalet.
primary_functions: Display the selected chalet summary along with currently chosen dates and guest counts, allowing users to adjust them if necessary.
Collect guest information such as lead guest name, contact details, number of adults and children, and special requests (including pet-related notes).
Show a detailed price breakdown for the stay (nightly rate, taxes, fees, and total price) and highlight that the total meets any budget constraint (e.g., under $2000).
Provide a 'Continue to review' or similar action that validates the form and moves the user to the booking review page.

incoming_params.description: ID of the chalet being booked.
Pre-selected check-in date carried from the chalet detail page.
Pre-selected check-out date carried from the chalet detail page.
Number of adults for the booking.
Number of children for the booking.
Optional number of pets included in the booking.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Continue to review' after successful form submission

access_methods.description: Accessed via booking.html?chaletId={id}&checkIn=&checkOut=&adults=&children=[&pets=]
Displayed after 'Book now' is clicked on a chalet detail page

pages.name: Chalet Booking Review
pages.description: Final review step for chalet bookings before confirming the reservation.
primary_functions: Summarize the booking including chalet name, address, dates, guest composition, and total price with taxes and fees.
Show important policies such as cancellation terms and check-in/check-out times so users understand conditions before confirming.
Allow users to go back to the booking form to fix any details or proceed to confirm the booking.
Provide a 'Confirm booking' action that finalizes the booking and displays a confirmation message with a reference code that can be used later in Manage Booking.

incoming_params.description: ID of the pending booking to review and confirm.

access_methods.description: Loaded as booking_review.html?bookingId={id} after form submission

pages.name: Store & Category Listing
pages.description: Unified store page that shows main store categories or, when filtered by categoryId or other parameters, lists products within a chosen category or subcategory.
primary_functions: Display top-level store categories such as Grocery & Essentials, Clothing & Accessories, Fireplace & Comfort, Candles & Ambience, Games & Entertainment, and Gift Cards when no category is selected.

When a categoryId is present (e.g., breakfast, dinner_ready_meals, snacks, clothing_accessories, fireplace_comfort, games_entertainment, gift_cards), list relevant products with images, prices, ratings, and key attributes.
Provide category-specific filters such as price range, rating (including 4.5+ star filter), and shipping options (e.g., free shipping) to refine product lists.
Support subcategory navigation within Clothing & Accessories (e.g., ski gloves, beanies, socks or thermal wear) and other areas using on-page filters or subcategory selectors.
Link each product to its product detail page where users can see full details and add items to their cart.

incoming_params.description: Store category key (e.g., 'grocery_essentials', 'clothing_accessories', 'fireplace_comfort', 'games_entertainment', 'gift_cards', 'breakfast', 'dinner_ready_meals', 'snacks').
Optional subcategory key within a category (e.g., 'ski_gloves', 'beanie', 'socks', 'thermal_wear').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card in any category or subcategory listing

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Store', 'Groceries & Essentials', and 'Shop gear' header links with appropriate categoryId
Accessible via footer links such as 'Gift cards', 'Games & entertainment', and 'Fireplace & comfort' with appropriate categoryId
Users can deep link into a specific category via store.html?categoryId={key}

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed product page for individual store items including groceries, winter gear, comfort items, games, and digital gift cards.
primary_functions: Show complete product information such as name, description, images, price, rating, review count, and shipping options (including identification of free shipping).
Allow users to choose product variants such as color (e.g., selecting blue ski gloves or a blue beanie), size, or pack size where applicable.
Support quantity selection and provide an 'Add to cart' button that adds the configured product and quantity to the shopping cart.
For digital gift cards, allow configuring card amount (e.g., $100 or $50), entering recipient email, and adding a custom message such as 'Enjoy a cozy chalet weekend on me!' before adding to cart.
For relevant physical products (e.g., firewood, candles, games, groceries), clearly show that they can be delivered to a selected chalet as part of a stay.

incoming_params.description: Product ID to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View cart' link or cart icon after adding items

access_methods.description: Accessed via product.html?id={productId}
Linked from store category listings or featured bundles on the homepage

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping basket where users review items, adjust quantities, and choose delivery options before checkout.
primary_functions: List all items added from the store (groceries, gear, fireplace items, games, gift vouchers) with names, key attributes, unit prices, quantities, and line totals.

Allow users to update quantities, remove items, and verify that the total item count or combination of products meets their intended bundle (e.g., exactly five grocery items, or one pair of gloves, one beanie, and one set of socks).
Display cart subtotal and, if relevant, estimated shipping while helping users keep the total under specified budgets (such as ensuring a winter gear bundle subtotal stays under $180).

Provide delivery option selection for physical items, including 'Chalet fridge stocking' for groceries and 'Deliver to chalet' for comfort and games, along with chalet selection dropdown and delivery date picker (e.g., day of check-in or next Saturday).
Offer a clear 'Proceed to checkout' button to move forward to the checkout flow once the cart contents and delivery options are correct.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Proceed to checkout' after successfully creating an order from the cart

access_methods.description: Accessible via a cart icon in the global header
Linked from product pages and mini-cart overlays

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Checkout flow for completing store purchases, including delivery details, purchaser information, and payment method selection.
primary_functions: Confirm or adjust delivery options carried over from the cart, including chalet selection and delivery date for physical items, while keeping gift cards flagged as digital delivery.
Collect purchaser details such as name, billing address, and email address (e.g., buyer@example.com) required to process the order.
Summarize the order items, subtotal, delivery method, and any applicable taxes or fees so users can verify everything before payment.

Present a payment method selection interface (e.g., selection of card or other methods) that users reach after entering their details, fulfilling the requirement to stop at the payment selection step without capturing real payment information.

incoming_params.description: ID of the draft order created from the cart for checkout.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Return to home' from payment selection or after reviewing order

access_methods.description: Accessed via checkout.html?orderId={id} after order creation from cart

pages.name: Favorites
pages.description: Central list of chalets the user has favorited for easy comparison and future booking.
primary_functions: Display all chalets that the user has marked as favorites, showing images, prices for upcoming typical stays, ratings, and number of reviews.
Allow users to open each favorite chalet in the chalet detail page for more information and booking actions.
Provide controls to remove chalets from the favorites list if they are no longer of interest.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a favorite chalet card

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Favorites' header link

pages.name: Manage Booking
pages.description: Entry page to look up an existing chalet booking by reference and last name so the user can view and modify it.
primary_functions: Present a booking lookup form where users enter their booking reference code (e.g., 'ABC123') and last name (e.g., 'Smith').
Validate the entered details and, on success, route the user to the booking details page for the matching reservation.
Provide basic error feedback if the booking cannot be found or the details are incorrect.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit the manage booking lookup form with a valid reference and last name

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Manage booking' header link
Lookup form submission triggers navigation to Booking Details & Extras

pages.name: Booking Details & Extras
pages.description: Detailed view of an existing chalet booking with the ability to add or manage stay extras and services.
primary_functions: Display the confirmed booking summary including chalet name, dates, guests, reference code, and current total price.

Offer an 'Add services' or 'Add extras' section listing optional add-ons such as airport transfer (one-way or round-trip, with passenger count), daily breakfast for specific guests and dates, and late checkout for the departure day.
Allow users to add, modify, or remove extras, automatically calculating the combined cost of added services and highlighting the total extras cost per booking.

Help users stay within a budget for extras (e.g., ensuring total extras for two adults do not exceed $240, or $120 per adult) by clearly showing the running total and enabling downgrading (such as switching airport transfer from round-trip to one-way).
Provide an 'Update booking' or 'Save changes' action that applies the selected extras to the booking and confirms the updated total.

incoming_params.description: ID of the booking to be displayed and modified.

access_methods.description: Accessed via booking_details.html?bookingId={id} after a successful lookup

pages.name: About
pages.description: Informational page about the chalet rental and store business.
primary_functions: Explain the brand story, mission, and what makes the chalet accommodations and services unique.
Introduce the location, local area highlights (such as ski lifts), and types of experiences offered to guests.
Build trust by mentioning quality, safety standards, and any partnerships or certifications.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About us' footer link
Users can navigate directly to about.html

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Page for users to get in touch with the chalet and store team.
primary_functions: Provide a contact form for general inquiries, questions about bookings, or issues related to store orders.
List direct contact details such as email address, phone number, and physical address or map if applicable.
Offer response time expectations and alternative contact options (e.g., emergency phone for urgent stay issues).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to home' link after submitting or viewing contact information

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Contact' footer link
Users can navigate directly to contact.html

pages.name: FAQ
pages.description: Frequently asked questions about chalet stays, store orders, gift cards, and policies.
primary_functions: Answer common questions about searching and booking chalets, including amenities, pets, and distance to ski lifts.
Cover store-related topics such as grocery delivery, chalet fridge stocking, delivery times, and free shipping criteria.
Explain how digital gift vouchers work, how they are delivered, and how recipients can redeem them.
Clarify how to modify bookings, add extras, and understand cancellation rules.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Read full policies' link from relevant FAQ answers

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'FAQ' footer link

pages.name: Policies
pages.description: Consolidated page for legal and policy information.
primary_functions: Present terms and conditions for chalet bookings, including payment terms, changes, and cancellations.
Detail privacy policy information about how user data and booking information are collected and used.
Outline store-specific policies for returns, refunds, delivery, and use of digital gift vouchers.
Provide clear links to any additional legal notices as needed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to FAQs' link from within specific policy sections

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Policies' footer link

header_links.description: Homepage with quick access to chalet search, store, and booking management
Main store hub with all categories and featured products
Store category listing for groceries and fridge-stocking essentials
Store category listing for winter clothing and accessories
List of chalets you have saved as favorites
Look up and manage an existing chalet booking

footer_links.description: Learn more about the chalet rental and store
Frequently asked questions about stays and orders
Search available chalets by date, price, and amenities
Digital chalet gift vouchers and gift cards
Board games and entertainment products for your stay
Firewood, matches, and comfort items for cozy evenings
